song.title: The Floor Is Mine
song.keywords: rock bottom, self-destruction, The Unseen Chorus
song.description: Full lyrics to 'The Floor Is Mine' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: The Floor Is Mine Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
og.description: Full lyrics to 'The Floor Is Mine' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

twitter.title: The Floor Is Mine Lyrics - The Unseen Chorus Musical
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'The Floor Is Mine' from The Unseen Chorus (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Spiraling.

essay: The Floor Is Mine reclaims agency and voice after secrecy and self-erasure. It turns performance into ownership, where visibility becomes a form of healing rather than defense.
song.lyricsHtml:
Another night
Another drink
Another stranger I don't even think

Bodies on my phone bodies at the bar
Bodies in the bathroom I've gone too far
Hands on my hips a mouth on my skin
I open the door and let anyone in

The floor is mine I crash I burn
No way back no lesson learned
The floor is mine I scream I fall
No one left to hear it all
The floor is mine the floor is mine

Porn on repeat ten tabs deep
My body's awake but my soul's asleep
Ass against tile strangers collide
I spread myself open just to feel alive

The floor is mine I spin I drown
The king of nothing I wear the crown
The floor is mine the walls all shake
I give and give till there's nothing to take
The floor is mine the floor is mine

I'm bleeding love on bathroom tiles
I fake a moan I fake the smiles
I sold my body I sold my name
Now rock bottom's all the same

The floor is mine I scream I break
Another hole another mistake
The floor is mine my soul's undone
A war I fought a war I've won
But I've lost I've lost I've lost

This floor is mine
And I'm not getting up
